name: New England Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 20 Top neck clams, shelled, chopped, strained, and juice reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the celery, leeks, and onions in clarified butter for six minutes. Add potatoes. Add flour to thicken, stirring continuously.
2. Add the chopped clams and juice. Continue simmering for one minute. Add heavy cream and water. Simmer for five minutes. Add salt to taste. To enhance flavor, remove from heat and let sit briefly before serving. If needed, add more water to achieve desired consistency.
